samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag output, set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="ADD" value="6'b100000">Addition operation.</constant>
        <constant id="ADDU" value="6'b100001">Unsigned addition operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SUB" value="6'b100010">Subtraction operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SUBU" value="6'b100011">Unsigned subtraction operation.</constant>
        <constant id="AND" value="6'b100100">Bitwise AND operation.</constant>
        <constant id="OR" value="6'b100101">Bitwise OR operation.</constant>
        <constant id="XOR" value="6'b100110">Bitwise XOR operation.</constant>
        <constant id="NOR" value="6'b100111">Bitwise NOR operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SLT" value="6'b101010">Set less than operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SLTU" value="6'b101011">Unsigned set less than operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SLL" value="6'b000000">Logical left shift operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SRL" value="6'b000010">Logical right shift operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SRA" value="6'b000011">Arithmetic right shift operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SLLV" value="6'b000100">Variable logical left shift operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SRLV" value="6'b000110">Variable logical right shift operation.</constant>
        <constant id="SRAV" value="6'b000111">Variable arithmetic right shift operation.</constant>
        <constant id="LUI" value="6'b001111">Load upper immediate operation.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="signed_a" value="(a[31]) ? {{32{1'b1}}, a} : {32{1'b0}} + a;">Signed representation of input operand a.</assign>
        <assign id="signed_b" value="(b[31]) ? {{32{1'b1}}, b} : {32{1'b0}} + b;">Signed representation of input operand b.</assign>
        <assign id="r" value="res[31:0];">Result of the operation.</assign>
        <assign id="flag" value="(aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? res[31] : 1'bz;">Flag output, set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</assign>
        <assign id="zero" value="(res == 32'h00000000) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;">Indicates whether the result is zero.</assign>
        <assign id="carry" value="res[32];">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation.</assign>
        <assign id="negative" value="res[31];">Indicates whether the result is negative.</assign>
        <assign id="overflow" value="res[32];">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        reg [32:0] res;
        always @(*) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD: res <= signed_a + signed_b;
                ADDU: res <= a + b;
                SUB: res <= signed_a - signed_b;
                SUBU: res <= a - b;
                AND: res <= a & b;
                OR: res <= a | b;
                XOR: res <= a ^ b;
                NOR: res <= ~(a | b);
                SLT: res <= (signed_a < signed_b) ? 33'd1 : 33'd0;
                SLTU: res <= (a < b) ? 33'd1 : 33'd0;
                SLL: res <= b << a[4:0];
                SRL: res <= b >> a[4:0];
                SRA: res <= $signed(b) >>> a[4:0];
                SLLV: res <= b << a[4:0];
                SRLV: res <= b >> a[4:0];
                SRAV: res <= $signed(b) >>> a[4:0];
                LUI: res <= {a[31:16], 16'b0};
                default: res <= 33'bz;
            endcase
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
